description: A robotics engineer needs to convert a 2D SVG outline into a 3D-printable solid part. Import the SVG file located at ~/Documents/FreeCAD/hc_sr04_mount.svg into FreeCAD. This SVG contains the 2D outline of a sensor mounting plate for an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor, including an outer rounded rectangle, four M3 mounting holes, and two sensor bore cutouts. Create a 3 mm thick solid plate with through-holes for the mounting hardware and sensors based on the SVG geometry and save the final 3D part to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/sensor_mount.FCStd.
